summary: PR #75597 is the canonical repair path for issue #75487, but it is not merge-ready: the branch is dirty/unmergeable, relevant checks are failing, and ClawSweeper review has three actionable findings. Because the same-repo head branch is writable, repair should update the contributor branch rather than replace it.

actions.reason: Keep the issue open until the repaired canonical PR lands and post-merge closeout is allowed.
Repair the contributor branch, address ClawSweeper findings and failing relevant checks, then rerun review and changed-surface validation.
Executor should update PR #75597 in place and preserve contributor credit.
